summary: ANDROID | Log In - When user is Logged out button does not work but user is Logged out
scenario: Log Out button in Account tab does not visually update to Log In after logout on Poly Studio Mobile app
description_clean: When a user taps the Log Out button in the app, the button does not appear to work (no action observed). However, if the user re-enters the Account tab, they are actually logged out. The issue appears to be a UI bug where the Log Out button remains displayed instead of switching to a Log In button after logout.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
4. Observe that no immediate visual feedback or action occurs (the button does not appear to respond).
5. Navigate away from the Account tab (e.g., go to Home or another tab).
expected: Tapping Log Out should immediately log the user out and the UI should update to show a Log In button on the Account screen.
actual: Tapping Log Out shows no immediate action; the Log Out button remains displayed. However, after leaving and re-entering the Account tab, the user is actually logged out (the Log In button is shown).
